utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items by name. However individual components each have costs (transportation €600, accommodation €800, activities €80 and €200) which implicitly sum to €1,680; this effectively provides a breakdown across items. The user task also requested restaurants, which is missing from the required format and the final package, but evaluation is strictly against the provided format. Therefore, all 7 items are included and sufficiently specified according to the format.
